title: narcissus gaditanus var. minutiflorus
intro: Narcissus gaditanus var. minutiflorus is a variety of the Narcissus gaditanus plant, commonly known as a type of daffodil or Jonquil, characterized by its small, delicate flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus gaditanus var. minutiflorus are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various forms.
